Feeding it _Experience_ with an _Experience Pump_ greatly speeds up growth, letting you convert _Experience_ into item form.
block.create_biotech.experience_tank.too: A tank for storing _Experience_; fill it using an _Experience Pump_.
block.create_biotech.experience_pipe.too: A copper pipe adapted to move _Experience_ through a pumped network.
When loaded with a Bionic Mechanism and supplied with Liquid Living Slime
Creates a _bionic creature_ based on nearby mobs
When the bionic creature has _Regeneration_ and is fan-_Haunted_
It can be converted into a real creature

Mount the _held item_ as bait, causing the _Rod_ to continuously lure _Animals_ tempted by it.

_Captures_ the _small creature_ in front of you into the box
Releases the _captured_ creature from the box
Dealing a _fatal blow_ to a creature will _capture_ it into the box

advancement.create_biotech.magma_belt.de: Kill a magma cube that swallowed a belt

create_biotech.ponder.creeper_blast_cham: Creeper Blast Chamber Assembly
The structure supports 3 different sizes.
The center of the top face must be a Mechanical Press.
The center of the bottom face must be a Bio Packager.
The frame of the structure is built from Explosion-Proof Casing.
The center block of any side face, except the top and bottom, can be replaced with Blast-Proof Glass.
In addition, every structure must include a Blast Chamber Core.
It also needs two Explosion-Proof Item Vaults of any size; connected vaults count as one.
After the structure forms, the top edges are automatically replaced with Encased Chain Drives.
You can use a Wrench to swap between casings and chain drives, but enough chain drives must remain to power every press.
Creeper Blast Chamber Overload
The Creeper Blast Chamber can handle speeds up to 128 RPM.
Any speed above 128 RPM will send it into an overloaded state.
Do not overload it for too long, unless you want an explosion big enough to destroy your base!
Creeper Blast Chamber High-Pressure Implosion
Feed a high-pressure creeper into the chamber...
to switch recipes into High-Pressure Implosion mode.
High-Pressure Implosion mode has its own recipes and no longer runs Crushing Wheel recipes.
Of course, overload explosions also become much more powerful.
Creeper Blast Chamber Operation
The Blast Chamber Core can input and output creepers using cardboard boxes.
The largest blast chamber can have up to 9 creepers working at once.
Apply rotational force...
For each creeper inside, the chamber takes one batch of items from the input vault, runs the matching Crushing Wheel recipe, and outputs the result to the output vault.
Hold right-click on a vault to switch it between input and output.
Creeper Blast Chamber Introduction
This is a Creeper Blast Chamber.
It can process Crushing Wheel recipes efficiently in bulk.
Or... are you looking for something more explosive?
create_biotech.ponder.bone_ratchet.text_: The Bone Ratchet only accepts rotation in one direction.
When given stress from the opposite direction, it jams the entire kinetic network.
create_biotech.ponder.evoker_enchanting_: This is an Evoker Enchanting Chamber.
It can turn copied enchanted books into usable enchanted books.
Supply it with the experience needed for enchanting through an Experience Pump.
The higher the total enchantment level, the more experience and time it requires.
This is a simple enchantment production line.
Mark an enchanted book on the side...
It will process the book below into an Enchanted Book (Copy).
Whether it is working or not, the printer needs a water supply to keep the squid alive.
create_biotech.ponder.magma_belt_connect: Using a blower to smelt items takes a lot of space.
Use a Magma Cube Belt instead.
It automatically smelts items above it, taking the same amount of time as a blower.
It does not have a blower's smelting protection, so remember to remove the item before it burns a second time!
create_biotech.ponder.slime_clutch.text_: The Slime Clutch automatically disengages when the input stress cannot drive the entire kinetic network, without affecting the rest of the network.
It automatically re-engages when enough stress is available.
create_biotech.ponder.squid_printer_s_89: This is an Evoker Enchanting Chamber.
It can turn copied enchanted books into usable enchanted books.
Supply it with the experience needed for enchanting through an Experience Pump.
The higher the total enchantment level, the more experience and time it requires.
create_biotech.ponder.squid_printer_scen: This is a simple enchantment production line.
Mark an enchanted book on the side...
It will process the book below into an Enchanted Book (Copy).
Whether it is working or not, the printer needs a water supply to keep the squid alive.
create_biotech.ponder.universal_joint.te: The Universal Joint can transmit rotational force between any two nearby points.
With one node as the center, the other must be within a 5x5x5 area.
create_biotech.ponder.experience_pump_s_: The output side emits experience orbs when it is unobstructed.
It can also output to an Experience Tank or other containers that accept experience.
The output side cannot turn experience directly into items.
You need to feed the experience into Budding Experience...
Catalyzed mature Experience Clusters drop naturally and store far more experience than Experience Nuggets.
create_biotech.ponder.experience_pump_sc: The Experience Pump can transfer experience between its two ends.
The input side accepts many forms of experience.
Installing a Nozzle on the input side attracts experience orbs from farther away.
create_biotech.ponder.schrodingers_cat.t: Schrodinger's Cat randomly outputs redstone signals from its back.
Its interval and output mode (sustained or pulse) can be configured from the side.
create_biotech.ponder.slime_belt_connect: The Slime Belt can transport items like a normal belt.
The difference is that items are not thrown off the end, but continue moving onto the back side of the belt.
The Slime Belt can also move items vertically.
Connected Slime Belts can form a loop.
create_biotech.ponder.spider_assembly_ta: The Spider Assembly Table can perform Sequenced Assembly recipes.
Right-click to open its interface, then place the required machines in the first row...
Place the required ingredients in the second row.
create_biotech.ponder.bio_packager_s_fe8: The Bio Packager automatically pulls cardboard boxes from its attached inventory and captures creatures killed by moving contraptions.
create_biotech.ponder.bio_packager_scene: The Bio Packager pulls boxes containing creatures from its attached inventory and releases them above itself.
create_biotech.ponder.power_belt_connect: The Power Belt generates stress when creatures move across it.
The faster creatures move above it, the higher the speed and stress it produces.
Stress from multiple entities stacks, but speed does not.
Use a Fixed Fishing Rod to put animals to work.
create_biotech.ponder.ghast_helm_s_29671: 恶魂热气球装配站 操纵
使用恶魂驾驶台来操控恶魂热气球
Alt 自动靠近附近未充能的装配站
create_biotech.ponder.ghast_helm_scene_1: 使用恶魂热气球装配站来组装你的恶魂热气球
使用强力胶粘合你的热气球
使用缓冲垫可以防止结构陷入地下
然后为热气球装配站接入红石...
再在装配站上方放一只恶魂...
靠近未充能的装配站或对绳索使用剪刀可以使结构解体
